turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Here is a scenario. I'm visiting a local bank branch or calling customer service to request help with everyday banking service. I may need to open a new account, update my details, or ask about specific features such as online banking or international transfers. So I need to practice banking, and you are the staff in the bank.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, I have a savings account in the Common Bank, and I want to update my address because I moved to a new apartment. I need to change my address.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do I need to carry out my physic card?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And what material or what thing do I need to carry out?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And another question is that, what type of account is suitable for the international student?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I need to lower rates and it's also I need to have the international transfer as well as the, you know, mounting free.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And I have another question. If I, you know, I'm an internet student now, and if I finished my, if I finished my school, and I will go back to my hometown and leave that country, so my, so my, so my cards need to, you know, you to off it, you to, you to, so how can I do that?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's free or should I need to pay some pay some bills?”
